chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 54 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.330/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.331/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For orders on CMA No.332/2023 (Stay/A) 5. For hearing of main case 24.01.2023 Mr. Riaz Ali Maitlo, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency application is granted. 2 to 5. Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks investigation of Crime No.310 of 2022, registered at Police Station Shaheed Murtaza Meerani, District Khairpur under Sections 364, 302, 201, 404, 120-B, P.P.C. The appropriate remedy is available under Section 22A(ii), Cr.P.C. before the concerned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace; hence, this petition, being not maintainable, is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
